Terms & Conditions

Please read it carefully

Eligibility & Applicability

  • The Offer is valid only for select serviceable pincodes within Mumbai & Bengaluru.
  • The Offer applies only to eligible standard products at store store only.
  • Customized products, made-to-order products, bulk orders, pre-orders, and any non-standard products shall not be eligible unless expressly stated.
  • Customers must verify next-day delivery availability by entering their delivery pincode prior to placing the order.
  • The order must be successfully placed and full payment must be completed before 4:00 PM (IST) to qualify.

Order & Delivery Conditions

  • Orders placed after 4:00 PM (IST) shall be considered as received on the next business day.
  • “Next Day Delivery” shall mean delivery on the next calendar day following order confirmation, subject to fulfillment of all eligibility conditions.
  • The Offer shall apply only where the delivery address falls within eligible Mumbai & Bengaluru pincodes.
  • In case of any rescheduling at the Customer end than in such case The Customer shall not be eligible for the complimentary pillow and the same if the delivery was scheduled but the Customer was unavailable.

Compensation & Liability

  • In the event the Company fails to deliver within the committed next-day timeline, and all eligibility conditions are satisfied, the Customer shall be entitled to one (1) complimentary pillow worth Rs.999/- as compensation.
  • The complimentary pillow shall be provided strictly in kind, limited to one (1) per eligible order, non-transferable and not redeemable for cash, refund, exchange, or credit note, and may be dispatched along with the original order or separately at the Company’s sole discretion.
  • The Company’s maximum liability under this Offer shall be limited strictly to providing the complimentary pillow worth Rs.999/-.
  • The Offer shall not apply to any delay arising due to incorrect or incomplete information provided by the Customer, Customer unavailability, order modification or rescheduling requests, payment authorization or fraud verification issues, logistics or operational constraints, or any circumstances beyond the Company’s reasonable control, including but not limited to force majeure events, natural calamities, governmental actions, strikes, or transportation disruptions.

General Condition

  • The Offer is non-transferable and cannot be clubbed with any other delivery guarantee or promotional scheme unless expressly stated.
  • The Company reserves the right to modify, suspend, or withdraw the Offer at its sole discretion without prior notice.
  • The Company’s decision regarding eligibility and applicability of this Offer shall be final and binding.
  • These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by the laws of India, and disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts at Mumbai.

Rich, Luxurious Soft Cushioning

Masterfully Handcrafted Excellence

Features

India's 1st & Only SmartGRID® Technology

Intelligently adapts to your body - soft comfort at pressure points and firm back support

GOLS Certified Natural Latex

Luxuriously soft, plush, & hypoallergenic with a gentle bounce helps you sleep peacefully

Pro Blend Technology

Natural latex & SmartGRID Technology allows optimal airflow for cooler, deeper sleep

5-Zone BodySense™ Technology

Distributes your body weight evenly for targeted support where you need it the most

SilverTex Damask fabric

Woven with pure silver threads, it offers antimicrobial protection for a hygienic surface

Pillow Top Finish

The Hamilton quilted pillow top coupled with a Euro Top design, delivers indulgent comfort

The Science behind Grand Elite Mattress - Custom

  • SilverTEX Damask Fabric
    Silver-Infused Fabric for a breathable, hygienic and luxurious surface
  • Hamilton Quilted Pillow Top Layer
    Ultra-Plush Quilting With a Soft Cushioning Layer for Enhanced Comfort
  • 2” LuxuraFlex Super Soft Comfort
    Uniform Pressure Relief With an Indulgently Soft Feel
  • 2” 100% Natural Latex with Euro Top finish
    Soft, Bouncy Latex Support With Euro Top Edge Stability
  • 1” Revolutionary SmartGRID® Technology
    Instantly Adapts, Cushions Pressure Points, And Supports Your Back
  • 2” Suprema Balance Layer
    Engineered To Balance Pressure Relief And Posture Support

    Targeted Support For Every Region Of Your Body

MS Dhoni

I believe 8 hours of peaceful sleep can change everything, and thanks to my SmartGRID Mattress from The Sleep Company, I finally feel it. Its SmartGRID technology adapts perfectly to my body, offering soft comfort and firm back support.

I never thought that a mattress would make a big difference on my back and posture. The Sleep Company proved me wrong. SmartGRID mattresses have completely changed the way I sleep. I can finally sleep peacefully every night.

As someone who is always on the lookout for groundbreaking innovation, I have personally tested SmartGRID and memory foam, in similar ways and the difference was striking! Once you experience SmartGRID, there's no going back.

Product Details

Product Specifications + -

Mattress Material:

  • Patented SmartGRID Technology
  • 100% Natural Latex
  • LuxuraFLEX Super Soft Layer
  • Supreme Balance Layer
  • 5 Zone BodySense Technology

Cover Material:

  • SilverTEX Damask Fabric

Mattress Feel:

  • Soft
Technical Specifications + -

Weight of Mattress:

  • Single Min. 19.01kg & Max. 24.65kg
  • Queen Min. 31.23kg & Max. 40.60kg
  • King Min. 37kg & Max. 47.01kg
Delivery & Shipping + -

Delivery:

  • We are pleased to offer free delivery on all orders.

Shipping:

  • Every mattress is specially crafted for you and is shipped directly from the factory.
Warranty & Trial + -

Warranty & Returns:

  • The 15-year limited warranty begins at the date of purchase and is valid up to 10 years from the date of purchase.

100 Nights Trial:

  • 100 Night Trial is applicable to all the mattresses (Standard + Custom).
  • Any concerns related to product damage or incorrect size must be reported within 10 days of delivery to be eligible for returns or replacements under the 100 Nights Trial.
Care Instructions + -
  • To clean stains and spills, use mild detergents and gently dab the cover instead of rubbing it.
  • Use a mattress protector to safeguard your SmartGRID mattress.
  • Refrain from using an iron on the mattress.
  • Avoid folding during moving; ensure that the mattress is not placed on a crib or frame with slats or bars spaced more than 2 inches apart.
Mattress Usability + -
  • Place the mattress on a flat surface, utilizing the SmartGRID side (top side) for optimal support.
  • Rotate mattress every 3 months, after rotation, position your feet where your head was previously for maximum longevity.
Product Details

Mattress Material:

  • Patented SmartGRID Technology
  • 100% Natural Latex
  • LuxuraFLEX Super Soft Layer
  • Supreme Balance Layer
  • 5 Zone BodySense Technology

Cover Material:

  • SilverTEX Damask Fabric

Mattress Feel:

  • Soft

Weight of Mattress:

  • Single Min. 19.01kg & Max. 24.65kg
  • Queen Min. 31.23kg & Max. 40.60kg
  • King Min. 37kg & Max. 47.01kg

Delivery:

  • We are pleased to offer free delivery on all orders.

Shipping:

  • Every mattress is specially crafted for you and is shipped directly from the factory.

Warranty & Returns:

  • The 15-year limited warranty begins at the date of purchase and is valid up to 10 years from the date of purchase.

100 Nights Trial:

  • 100 Night Trial is applicable to all the mattresses (Standard + Custom).
  • Any concerns related to product damage or incorrect size must be reported within 10 days of delivery to be eligible for returns or replacements under the 100 Nights Trial.
  • To clean stains and spills, use mild detergents and gently dab the cover instead of rubbing it.
  • Use a mattress protector to safeguard your SmartGRID mattress.
  • Refrain from using an iron on the mattress.
  • Avoid folding during moving; ensure that the mattress is not placed on a crib or frame with slats or bars spaced more than 2 inches apart.
  • Place the mattress on a flat surface, utilizing the SmartGRID side (top side) for optimal support.
  • Rotate mattress every 3 months, after rotation, position your feet where your head was previously for maximum longevity.

FIND MY PERFECT FIT

Not just buzz. It’s an impact

FAQ’s
01
01 What makes the Grand Elite mattress so luxurious? +
The Grand Elite mattress features premium materials, including LuxuraFLEX and Suprema Balance layers, designed to provide unparalleled comfort and support.
02
02 What is the comfort level of the Grand Elite mattress? +
The Grand Elite mattress offers a plush, luxury-soft feel.
03
03 Is the Grand Elite mattress suitable for all sleeping positions? +
Yes, the Grand Elite mattress is suitable to aid all sleeping positions. Whether it is side, back, or stomach sleepers.
04
04 Does the Grand Elite mattress come with a warranty? +
Yes, the Grand Elite mattress comes with a 15-year warranty.
05
05 Can I try the Grand Elite mattress in-store before purchasing? +
Yes, the Grand Elite mattress is available for in-store trials at select locations in Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Delhi, and Kolkata. Please call at 9811981911 before visiting.
06
06 How long does delivering the Grand Elite mattress take? +
Delivery times vary, but most orders are fulfilled within 15 days.
07
07 Is the Grand Elite mattress compatible with adjustable bases? +
Yes, the Grand Elite mattress is designed to work with adjustable bases.
08
08 Can I purchase the Grand Elite mattress online? +
Yes, the Grand Elite mattress is available for purchase on our website for the Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, Delhi, and Kolkata stores.

What is Grand Elite Mattress - Custom?

+

What is the Smart Grand Elite Mattress?

The Grand Elite is ideal for the sleep connoisseur who seeks nothing less than the best – a convergence of innovation and artistry to create the most comfortable sleep ever. The Smart Grand Elite Mattress is the epitome of luxury in sleep technology. Designed for those who demand the finest, this mattress combines advanced innovations with exceptional craftsmanship to offer the best sleep experience. Our premium mattress combines luxury and advanced technology for the extra ordinary sleep experience.

Features that make Smart Grand Elite Unique

Pro-Blend Technology: The combination of 100% Natural Latex and SmartGRID Technology offers exceptional support, pressure relief, and breathability. Get personalised comfort with the blend of these two innovative technologies. SmartGRID adapts to your body shape while latex offers resilience for ultimate support. Pro-Blend technology in Grand Elite makes it one of a kind luxurious and premium mattress that is designed with the combination of multiple technologies without compromising its royal aesthetics.

LuxuraFLEX Comfort: This unique super soft comfort layer is crafted in such a way that it offers a subtle soft feel along with equal pressure distribution. No matter how you sleep, this layer includes the integration of Suprema Balance Layer and 5 Zone BodySense Technology comfort for enhanced comfort. This makes every night's sleep a luxurious retreat. Experience the luxury of our premium mattress that contours to your body for personalized comfort.


SilverTex Damask Fabric: Features a revolutionary fabric interwoven with pure silver threads. This fabric is breathable, anti-microbial, and temperature-regulating, offering a hygienic and comfortable sleep environment.

Handcrafted Excellence: mattress undergoes 250 hours of skilled craftsmanship, ensuring every detail is perfected. The meticulous process highlights the dedication to quality and luxury.

Benefits of Smart Grand Elite Mattress

Comfort: advanced Pro-Blend Technology and LuxuraFLEX super soft comfort layer provide an incredible luxurious sleep experience. Enjoy exceptional softness and support that adjusts to your body’s needs, providing exceptional pressure relief and a truly peaceful night’s sleep. The Grand Elite perfectly contour to your body’s shape that reduces discomfort and enhances relaxation. Sleeping on it is like making every night a luxurious escape. If you're looking for a premium mattress that offers both durability and comfort, this is the perfect choice.

Hygienic Luxury: The SilverTex Damask fabric ensures that your sleep environment remains clean and fresh. Its anti-microbial properties protect against allergens and bacteria, while its temperature-regulating capabilities keep you cool throughout the night. This combination not only promotes a healthier sleep surface but also enhances your overall comfort and well-being.

Elegant Design: The handcrafted nature of the Smart Grand Elite Pro Mattress brings a touch of grandeur to any bedroom. Its luxurious materials and meticulous construction reflect a commitment to excellence, elevating the aesthetic of your space and adding an element of sophistication. The mattress not only provides exceptional comfort but also serves as a statement piece of luxury in your home.

Size Chart

The Smart Grand Elite Pro Mattress is available in two standard sizes to meet your comfort and room requirements. Each size is meticulously designed to provide optimal comfort and luxury, regardless of your sleep preference or space needs. It ensures you enjoy the same luxurious sleep experience regardless of the size you choose.

King Size: 10 and 12 inches

  • 10 inches: Ideal for those who prefer a moderately thick mattress that offers the perfect balance of plush comfort and sturdy support. The 10-inch thickness provides ample cushioning while maintaining a sleek and elegant profile for your bedroom.
  • 12 inches: A thicker, more luxurious option, the 12-inch King-size mattress enhances the feeling of indulgence with extra cushioning for ultimate comfort. This size is perfect for those who crave a deeper, more immersive sleep experience. Whether you're stretching out solo or sharing the bed, the King-size offers a spacious, regal sleep surface fit for royalty.

Queen Size: 10 and 12 inches

  • 10 inches: For those seeking comfort with a compact profile, the 10-inch Queen-size mattress is a refined choice. It provides the same luxurious feel with a more understated presence, making it ideal for smaller master bedrooms or guest rooms that don't compromise on quality.
  • 12 inches: This thicker Queen-size option brings an additional layer of plushness, offering an opulent sleep experience in a more intimate size. The 12-inch height enhances the mattress's comfort and support, making it the go-to choice for those who desire the luxury of a King-size feel in a smaller footprint.

Price

Priced at 1,48,900

Though the Smart Grand Elite Mattress comes at a premium price, it is an investment worth making. With its unmatched luxury, advanced technology, and handcrafted excellence, this mattress delivers the ultimate sleep experience, making every penny spent truly worthwhile. Indulge in the best, because your comfort deserves nothing less.
